docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY KRAMER, LYN AS TO DEFENDANT BABAKOLAN, BERNARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF LYN KRAMER & DEFENDANT BERNARD BABAKOLAN. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRAMER, LYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BABAKOLAN, BERNARD $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,805.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-20-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BABAKOLAN, BERNARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-11-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
